title: Dev v0.5.19 NPC Kills Calculator
notes:
Changes:
- Adds NPC Kills Calculator to the Dev app calculator tab.
- Dev already had Boost Goal Calculator, so Dev now has the same 5 calculator list:
  1. Token / Income Calculator
  2. Stat Gains Calculator
  3. Goal Time Calculator
  4. Boost Goal Calculator
  5. NPC Kills Calculator
- NPC Kills Calculator explains how to get seconds per kill:
  time 10 kills, then divide total seconds by 10.
